sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 17.104 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.17)

statement.latex: Let$$be a finite non-oriented graph on the set of vertices$\{x_1, ,x_n\}$and let$S_ = x_1, ,x_n x_ix_j=x_jx_i (x_i,x_j) ;\;\, { A}^2$be a presentation of a partially commutative metabelian group$S_$in the variety of all metabelian groups. Is the universal theory of the group$S_$decidable? { V.\,N.\,Remeslennikov, E.\,I.\,Timoshenko}

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
